Just now

Complete Python Bootcamp For Everyone From Zero to Hero
Python Database Course: SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL,SQLAlchemy
Java Data Structures and Algorithms Masterclass
For years, I measured my progress like most developers do.
How many books I read.
How many courses I finished.
How many programming languages I knew.
How many frameworks I had added to my resume.
It felt like I was making progress.
But one day I looked back and asked myself a simple question:
“What have I actually built?”
That question changed the way I think about software engineering.
The tech industry has made learning addictive.
Every day there’s something new.
A new AI model.
A new JavaScript framework.
